title: handle_key mixes permission-modal, streaming-cancel, and normal-input state machines
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Cognitive Readability / SRP
Location: src/tui/app.rs:479-562 fn handle_key
Violation: One 84-line function contains four mutually exclusive input contexts: ctrl-C dispatch that also knows about the permission modal (481-489), permission-modal key handling (492-524), streaming-cancel handling (527-540), normal-editing key dispatch (542-561). Cognitive complexity explodes because the reader must track which mode the App is in. Early-returns obscure that the blocks own different state (pending_permission, is_waiting, input).
Mandated Refactor: Make the mode explicit: enum InputMode { Editing, AwaitingPermission(PendingPermission), Streaming }. Then match self.input_mode for each key. Each handler is <30 lines and can be tested in isolation.
